paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF), combining Math Evol-Instruct for automatic instruction evolution and process-supervised reinforcement learning via Instruction Reward Model (IRM) and Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM) to improve mathematical reasoning
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, chain-of-thought (CoT) problem solving, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of large language models without using external Python tools
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning with evolved math instructions and process supervision via PRM and IRM
raw_extraction.extension: Math Evol-Instruct enables automatic generation of diverse and increasingly complex math problems through downward and upward evolution, improving data diversity and difficulty range
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct
